'''Nedij''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] on the eastern spiral arm of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It had thin air in which its native [[Species/Legends|species]] evolved. Natural terrain included snowy mountains which the [[Nediji]] preferred, and lowlands. The planet was inhabited by a species of [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] which served as prey for the Nediji. The [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] operative [[Kaird]] hailed from this planet.

{{Planet-stub}}
